inputs.label: First Term (a1)
inputs.businessContext: Starting value of the arithmetic progression

businessContext_i18n.en: Starting value of the arithmetic progression
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur de départ de la progression arithmétique
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor inicial de la progresión aritmética

businessContext_i18n.fr: Différence constante entre les termes consécutifs

inputs.label: Start Term Index
inputs.businessContext: Index of the first term to include in the segment (1-based)

businessContext_i18n.en: Index of the first term to include in the segment (1-based)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Segmente dahil edilecek ilk terimin indeksi (1 tabanlı)
businessContext_i18n.de: Index des ersten Terms, der in das Segment aufgenommen werden soll (1-basiert)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice du premier terme à inclure dans le segment (base 1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice del primer término a incluir en el segmento (basado en 1)
businessContext_i18n.ar: مؤشر أول حد لإدراجه في المقطع (يبدأ من 1)

inputs.label: End Term Index
inputs.businessContext: Index of the last term to include in the segment (must be ≥ startIndex)

businessContext_i18n.en: Index of the last term to include in the segment (must be ≥ startIndex)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Segmente dahil edilecek son terimin indeksi (startIndex'ten büyük veya eşit olmalı)
businessContext_i18n.de: Index des letzten Terms, der in das Segment aufgenommen werden soll (muss ≥ startIndex sein)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Indice du dernier terme à inclure dans le segment (doit être ≥ indice de début)
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice del último término a incluir en el segmento (debe ser ≥ índice inicial)
businessContext_i18n.ar: مؤشر آخر حد لإدراجه في المقطع (يجب أن يكون ≥ مؤشر البداية)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
